message:
Command `cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

nohup librelane \
    --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
    --pdk sky130A \
    --run-tag pnr_run_v2 \
    config.json \
    > /tmp/pnr_v2_full.log 2>&1 &

PNR_PID=$!
echo "LibreLane PID: $PNR_PID"
echo $PNR_PID > /tmp/pnr_v2_full.pid
sleep 10
ps -p $PNR_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
tail -15 /tmp/pnr_v2_full.log` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

nohup librelane \
    --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
    --pdk sky130A \
    --run-tag pnr_run_v2 \
    config.json \
    > /tmp/pnr_v2_full.log 2>&1 &

echo "LibreLane PID: $PNR_PID"
